title: Farewell to the Ark
overview: A surreal, isolated village sees its inhabitants gradually leave behind their mutual traditions and superstitions as they leave for the city. Among them are two cousins who love each other and who get into a quarrel with other villagers.

trailers.title: Farewell to the Ark 1984 music by J. A. Seazer
